source_request: Plan implementation for GitHub issue #5 in /Users/brian/dev/github/kontourai/kontour-console: add a dependency-free Kontour emitter plus local and composite sink skeleton.

next_action.summary: Verified dependency-free local emitter/sink skeleton, focused tests, and local plus future API fanout docs.

validation.summary: 17 tests passed, including event fanout, loader compatibility, sync/async per-sink failure results, nested failure propagation, outcome normalization, stable projection identity, unsafe token rejection, symlink root rejection, final destination symlink rejection, and intermediate symlink rejection.
Checked-in fixtures inspected with 0 errors and existing inert action descriptor warnings.
No child_process, command execution, fetch/open, or network imports in the new implementation. Matches are pre-existing inert URL literals in fixture/docs/tests.
Implementation-level forbidden API scan returned no matches.

validation.command: rg -n "generatedAt" src test README.md docs/specs/emitter-sink-plane-contract.md docs/specs/projection-schema.md
validation.summary: Emitter explicitly strips generatedAt from derivedFrom identity; tests assert projection record identity is stable across generatedAt changes.
Package root exports all new emitter/sink classes.

review.summary: No findings after async sink and nested outcome normalization fixes.
No security findings after symlink root/intermediate/destination and safe error handling fixes.
